sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80711" key="penta/pleuron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντά-πλευρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n80711.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">figure with five sides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:396:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">396.13</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
